description_long: A rectangular dark wooden serving tray holds four pieces of sushi, each wrapped in black seaweed with visible white rice and a pinkish filling, likely tuna or salmon. The sushi pieces are neatly aligned in a row, and a pair of black chopsticks with white tips rests diagonally across the tray, suggesting readiness for eating. The tray itself is simple and slightly elevated on four short legs, giving it a traditional Japanese presentation style. The sushi pieces have a classic maki roll appearance, with the filling centered and surrounded by rice and nori. The overall arrangement is clean and minimalistic, emphasizing the freshness and visual appeal of the sushi. No additional garnishes or sauces are present on the tray.
description: A dark wooden tray with four maki sushi rolls and a pair of black chopsticks, arranged in a clean, traditional style.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four sushi rolls in a row with chopsticks resting diagonally on the tray.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular cross-section of the sushi rolls and the chopsticks' placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the sushi rolls and the chopsticks angled away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sushi rolls' sides and the chopsticks resting on the tray.
